# college-practicals
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
    <title>My Shopping Website</title>
</head>

<body>

    <h1 align="center">🛒 My Shopping Store</h1>

    <hr>

    <center>
        <a href="#">Home</a> |
        <a href="#">Products</a> |
        <a href="#">Cart</a> |
        <a href="#">Contact</a>
    </center>

    <hr>

    <h2 align="center">Our Products</h2>

    <table border="1" align="center" cellpadding="10">

        <tr>
            <th>Product</th>
            <th>Price</th>
            <th>Buy</th>
        </tr>

        <tr>
            <td>Mobile Phone <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," width="300"></td>
            <td>₹15,000</td>
            <td><button>Buy Now</button></td>
            <td>fgdfd</td>
        </tr>

        <tr>
            <td>Laptop <img src="data:image/webp;base64," width="300"></td>
            <td>₹50,000</td>
            <td><button>Buy Now</button></td>
        </tr>

        <tr>
            <td>Headphones <img src="https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcRCt0QXScDtHvqPkezVqFfcx4QSogjwQj3rDVU7rOFJZA&s=10" width="300"></td>
            <td>₹2,000</td>
            <td><button>Buy Now</button></td>
        </tr>

        <tr>
            <td>Smart Watch <img src="https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcTxuQJ-2Z7Bl4_FIIqkyb2xHdyt-g84LMpIcjFfDmQ3FA&s=10" width="300"></td>
            <td>₹3,500</td>
            <td><button>Buy Now</button></td>
        </tr>

    </table>

    <br>

    <h3 align="center">Thank You for Visiting!</h3>

</body>

</html>
